name: Lviv Oblast (Ukraine)

colors.symbolism: the heraldic azure of medieval Galicia–Volhynia

description: A blue field charged in the centre with a golden lion rampant — the historic arms of the Kingdom of Galicia.
history: Adopted as the regional flag of Lviv Oblast. The golden lion on azure is the heraldic emblem of the medieval Kingdom of Galicia–Volhynia, in continuous use as the symbol of the city of Lviv and the surrounding territory since the 13th century. It is also the heraldic source for the modern Ukrainian national flag's blue-and-yellow palette.

features.symbolism: the medieval arms of Galicia–Volhynia, the historic kingdom from which Ukraine's blue-and-yellow heraldry descends
